name: il2korea_dynamic_campaign
description: Minimal IL-2 Korea scenario generator shell

scripts.test: node -e "const { buildOptions, buildScenario } = require('./src/generator'); const options = buildOptions(); if (!options.aircraft.length) throw new Error('No aircraft options'); const scenario = buildScenario({ aircraft: options.aircraft[0], targetType: options.targetTypes[0], landscape: options.landscapes[0], enemyFaction: 'Any', weather: 'Clear' }, { exportToGame: false }); console.log(scenario.outputPath);"
